As theAAU Junior Olympics track and field meet 2024concludes on Day 8, the excitement and action has been non-stop  throughout the event.

Over the course of the competition, numerous champions emerged, showcasing remarkable talent and dedication.

One of the most famous events, the 200m dash, had standout performances delivered by Saleia Stoew and Cerenity Bell among the youngest competitors, while Keyzelle Thomas and Liam Jones shone in the older age groups.

Here is the complete list of AAU Junior Olympics 2024 winners.

• Theresa Albertson - Southern Jersey Track and Field - 7:26.60

• Logan Alsobrook - Elite Feet Performance - 2:15.93

The 2024 Junior Olympics Track and Field competition isstreaming live on FloTrack, MileSplit and the FloSports app.Highlights, replays and breaking news are on both platforms.

Don't miss all the track and field season action streaming on FloTrack.Check out the FloTrack schedule for more events.

Video footage from each event will be archived and stored in a video library for FloTrack subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.
